title: Building flutter_local_ai: Bringing On-Device AI to Flutter
content:
2025 is the year on-device AI went mainstream. Apple Intelligence, Gemini Nano, and a whole wave of local LLMs are making their way into our phones. But here's the thing: as a Flutter developer, I found myself staring at a problem. How do you actually use these powerful, privacy-preserving AI models in a Flutter app?

The answer? There wasn't one. So I built it. 🚀

## Why On-Device AI Matters

Let's be real—sending every prompt to the cloud isn't always what you want. Sometimes you need:

- **Privacy**: Keep sensitive data on the device
- **Speed**: No network latency, instant responses
- **Offline**: Work without an internet connection
- **Cost**: No API bills for every request

On-device AI gives you all of this. It's the future of mobile AI, and Flutter developers deserve a simple way to tap into it.

## The Story Behind flutter_local_ai

I was working on a project that needed local AI capabilities. I looked around, and... nothing. The Flutter ecosystem had packages for cloud AI, but nothing unified for on-device models. Apple had Foundation Models, Android had ML Kit Generative AI, but using them meant writing platform-specific code. That's not the Flutter way.

So I did what any developer would do: I built the package I wished existed. After diving into native iOS and Android implementations, I created a unified API that works seamlessly across platforms. One interface, two platforms, zero compromises.

## What It Does

**flutter_local_ai** gives you a single, clean API to run on-device AI models:

- **Apple platforms**: Wraps Foundation Models (Apple Intelligence / Core ML)
- **Android**: Wraps ML Kit Generative AI (Gemini Nano)
- **Unified interface**: Same code works everywhere
- **Privacy-first**: Everything runs locally by default
- **Text generation**: Generate responses from prompts
- **Embeddings**: Get vector representations of text
- **Extensible**: Built for future features

No cloud calls, no API keys, no data leaving the device (unless you explicitly want it to).

## Quick Start

Here's how simple it is to get started:

```dart
import 'package:flutter_local_ai/flutter_local_ai.dart';

// Initialize the AI engine
final ai = await LocalAI.initialize();

// Generate text
final response = await ai.generate(
  prompt: 'Write a haiku about coding',
  maxTokens: 100,
);

print(response.text);
```

That's it. Three lines of code, and you're running AI locally. The package handles all the platform-specific complexity behind the scenes.

## What You Can Build

The possibilities are endless. Here are some ideas to get you started:

- **Local AI Assistants**: Build smart assistants that work offline
- **Smart Notes**: Auto-summarize, categorize, or enhance your notes
- **Private AI Features**: Add AI capabilities without privacy concerns
- **Offline Agents**: Create autonomous agents that work without connectivity
- **Content Generation**: Generate text, summaries, or translations on-device
- **Smart Search**: Use embeddings for semantic search in your app

Imagine a note-taking app that summarizes your thoughts as you write, or a chat app that suggests responses without ever leaving your device. That's the power of on-device AI.

## The Road Ahead

This is just the beginning. Here's what's coming:

- **More model options**: Support for additional on-device models
- **Streaming responses**: Real-time token generation
- **Fine-tuning support**: Customize models for your use case
- **Better embeddings**: Enhanced vector operations
- **Performance optimizations**: Faster inference, lower memory usage

The AI landscape is moving fast, and I'm committed to keeping flutter_local_ai at the forefront.

## Try It Out

Ready to add on-device AI to your Flutter app? Check out the package:

🔗 **[flutter_local_ai on pub.dev](https://pub.dev/packages/flutter_local_ai)**

📦 **[GitHub Repository](https://github.com/kekko7072/flutter_local_ai)**

I'd love to see what you build with it! Try it out, share your feedback, or contribute to the project. This is built for the Flutter community, and your input shapes its future.

Let's make Flutter the best platform for on-device AI. One package at a time. 💙
excerpt: Introducing flutter_local_ai: a unified API for on-device AI in Flutter. Run Apple Intelligence and Gemini Nano locally, with privacy and speed built in.
